author: MysteriousWays
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmed2 hours agoReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by MysteriousWays on2 hours ago16 hours agoMtBeautyGeorgesaid:yesterday at 3:05pmBiomedhiker1said:One huge advantage of hiring Iraola is that when he was preparing his Bournemouth teams to face Liverpool, he must have watched a lot of tapes of the players who are in the squad and so already knows a lot about the players he will be coaching. I hope Iraola has a lot more influence on the players to keep and players to sign for the upcoming season. It's important that the club assembles a squad that fits with Iraola's tactics, rather than just buying players with potential or players who are great in their positions but not suited to the manager's way of playing.Basing my reply on nothing, but I somehow get the sense that he will be, or has already been, given that influence.There wasn't much to stop Hughes and Iraola having the odd chat over the last few months about footballers, in general like, no tapping up necessary at all etc etc.I don't know how it will go with Iraola, could be great could be something else entirely but it won't be for lack of forward planning it doesn't work out anyway, if it doesn't.
